CVE-2012-1096.title: NetworkManager 0.9 and earlier allows local users to use other us ...
CVE-2012-1096.summary: NetworkManager 0.9 and earlier allows local users to use other users' certificates or private keys when making a connection via the file path when adding a new connection.

CVE-2018-1000135.title: GNOME NetworkManager version 1.10.2 and earlier contains a Inform ...
CVE-2018-1000135.summary: GNOME NetworkManager version 1.10.2 and earlier contains a Information Exposure (CWE-200) vulnerability in DNS resolver that can result in Private DNS queries leaked to local network's DNS servers, while on VPN. This vulnerability appears to have been fixed in Some Ubuntu 16.04 packages were fixed, but later updates removed the fix. cf. https://bugs.launchpad.net/ubuntu/+bug/1754671 an upstream fix does not appear to be available at this time.

CVE-2024-6501.title: A flaw was found in NetworkManager. When a system running Network ...
CVE-2024-6501.summary: A flaw was found in NetworkManager. When a system running NetworkManager with DEBUG logs enabled and an interface eth1 configured with LLDP enabled, a malicious user could inject a malformed LLDP packet. NetworkManager would crash, leading to a denial of service.
